rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing connections or subcomponents, not by adding AGREE clauses
Ensure all AGREE assignments are in valid implementation scopes
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for assignments
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing architecture, not by adding AGREE clauses
Ensure all AGREE assignments are in valid implementation scopes
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for assignments
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE assignments are allowed only in component implementations
AGREE assignments must use visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
AGREE assignments must be in valid implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not add AGREE clauses to repair validator diagnostics
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in assignments
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumed type vs actual type
